# Transformers

Transformers are a neural network architecture introduced in "Attention Is All You Need" (2017).

Key features:
- Self-attention mechanism for parallel processing
- Multi-head attention for multiple representation subspaces
- Positional encoding for sequence order

Related concepts: [[Multi-Head Attention]], [[GPT]], [[BERT]]

See also: [[Vaswani et al.]]
